calendar.matters:
Amended Notice Of Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Mar-25-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - KELLY SCHROCK, TEL. NO. 238-3884, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF SUSAN BALDINI'S Amended Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement IS GRANTED. LATE OPPOSITION WAS FILED. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB

Notice Of Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Mar-11-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF SUSAN BALDINI'S Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement IS OFF CALENDAR. AMENDED NOTICE FILED WITH HEARING SCHEDULED FOR MARCH 25, 2010. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-12-2005 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-12-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Settlement Conference this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha.
Francisco Torres, Esq. for Plaintiff, Susan Baldini, Inc.
Defendant: Kelly Schrock, present with Limited Scope Representation counsel: Mairi McKeever
The parties reached a settlement, Settlement Agreement and, in the event of default, Stipulation for Entry of Judgment signed by the parties, and approved by Comm. Kaplan, received and filed in court. Terms of the settlement were not read into the record.
Matter is deemed settled and off the Settlement Conference calendar, Trial date vacated.
